log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Water Genasi — Armored Tank's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20(ADV):12+6=18 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Archmage's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Cone of Cold (Level 5 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 CON save. 60ft cone.
→ Water Genasi — Armored Tank: FAIL! 47 cold damage + .
→ 1/1 targets affected.
=== ROUND 2 ===

→ Water Genasi — Armored Tank is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Archmage's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Cone of Cold (Level 5 slot, 1 remaining). DC 17 CON save. 60ft cone.
→ Water Genasi — Armored Tank: FAIL! 37 cold damage + .

→ 1/1 targets affected.
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 2 rounds ===
